## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Aembit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, recent publications, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/vEKXCPVG-csxp88q7CZsM2uyaF_oqegs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Two articles published, two more close to publication after final review](https://fathom.video/share/vEKXCPVG-csxp88q7CZsM2uyaF_oqegs?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)
  - [New workflow improvements implemented, resulting in higher quality content](https://fathom.video/share/vEKXCPVG-csxp88q7CZsM2uyaF_oqegs?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
  - [Focus on balancing "depth" (technical) and "breadth" (overview) articles](https://fathom.video/share/vEKXCPVG-csxp88q7CZsM2uyaF_oqegs?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Leveraging industry sources (e.g., Gartner reports, LinkedIn posts) to inform content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/vEKXCPVG-csxp88q7CZsM2uyaF_oqegs?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality Improvements

  - [Issues with technical accuracy in "depth" articles addressed through:](https://fathom.video/share/vEKXCPVG-csxp88q7CZsM2uyaF_oqegs?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
      - [Using specific artifacts/documents from Aembit as source material](https://fathom.video/share/vEKXCPVG-csxp88q7CZsM2uyaF_oqegs?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
      - [Updating workflows to improve content generation](https://fathom.video/share/vEKXCPVG-csxp88q7CZsM2uyaF_oqegs?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
      - [Avoiding forced inclusion of Aembit-specific content where not relevant](https://fathom.video/share/vEKXCPVG-csxp88q7CZsM2uyaF_oqegs?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Balancing "depth" (technical, 4,500+ words) and "breadth" (overview, \~2,000 words) articles](https://fathom.video/share/vEKXCPVG-csxp88q7CZsM2uyaF_oqegs?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Considering updating/merging existing pillar content instead of creating new, potentially cannibalizing articles](https://fathom.video/share/vEKXCPVG-csxp88q7CZsM2uyaF_oqegs?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)
  - [Expanding into adjacent topics (e.g., secrets management, identity federation) to attract relevant audience](https://fathom.video/share/vEKXCPVG-csxp88q7CZsM2uyaF_oqegs?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)

### New Content Creation

  - [Six new articles created, including a 4,500-word piece on SPIFFE](https://fathom.video/share/vEKXCPVG-csxp88q7CZsM2uyaF_oqegs?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
  - [Two "breadth" articles on secret remediation and management best practices](https://fathom.video/share/vEKXCPVG-csxp88q7CZsM2uyaF_oqegs?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
  - [Potential update/merge of existing "Guide to Non-Human Identity" content](https://fathom.video/share/vEKXCPVG-csxp88q7CZsM2uyaF_oqegs?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)

### Industry Resources

  - [Leveraging Gartner reports and former analyst's upcoming content series](https://fathom.video/share/vEKXCPVG-csxp88q7CZsM2uyaF_oqegs?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
  - [Mining LinkedIn posts, podcasts, and other industry discussions for topic ideas and unique perspectives](https://fathom.video/share/vEKXCPVG-csxp88q7CZsM2uyaF_oqegs?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)
  - [Exploring Google Scholar for relevant academic research to inform content](https://fathom.video/share/vEKXCPVG-csxp88q7CZsM2uyaF_oqegs?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

### SEO and Performance

  - [Need to regularly update older content (8-10+ months) to maintain relevance for LLMs and search engines](https://fathom.video/share/vEKXCPVG-csxp88q7CZsM2uyaF_oqegs?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)
  - [Creating a dashboard to track published content performance using Google Search Console data](https://fathom.video/share/vEKXCPVG-csxp88q7CZsM2uyaF_oqegs?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)

## Next Steps

1.  Dan to review and approve articles \#3 and \#5 for publication
2.  Team to evaluate SPIFFE article against existing content for potential merge/update
3.  Dan to review two new "breadth" articles on secret management
4.  Dan to share Gartner reports and other industry artifacts with GrowthX team
5.  GrowthX to create performance dashboard for published content
6.  Team to continue mining industry sources (Gartner, LinkedIn, Google Scholar) for content ideas
7.  Consider updating/refreshing older pillar content to improve performance
